comment: TDMRep machine-readable rights reservation for AI Safe@Work. EU CDSM Directive (2019/790) Article 4 opt-out. Reserves rights against text-and-data-mining for any purpose other than non-commercial scientific research per Article 3. Updated 2026-05-19.
applies-to: all content under https://aisafeatwork.org/ and any mirror domains under operation of the rights holder
scope-notes: Free core content (12 modules, 2 Relevant Roles, 2 templates, standards-map, citations, changelog, accessibility, complaints, doctrine) is offered under CC BY-SA 4.0 for human + machine reading WITH attribution and link-back. Use for AI model training is reserved.
Paid surfaces (when published) are entirely reserved against TDM regardless of purpose.
Citation engines that fetch on-demand to answer a user query AND link back to source are permitted on free core.
Bulk crawlers building training corpora are prohibited on all surfaces.
